design_philosophy: A premium, cinematic, and highly architectural digital experience. Embraces deep charcoal black backgrounds, striking white typography, and elegant gold accents to convey elite status, trustworthiness, and high-end design focus. Prioritizes large, dramatic imagery, minimalist layouts, and generous negative space.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
rules.overline: text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#D4AF37]

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Leverage asymmetric bento grids for features and portfolio.

motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Subtle image scale (scale-105) on hover with a smooth transition (duration-500). Borders should subtly glow or change to the gold accent color.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion for elegant fade-up and subtle Y-axis translations on scroll.
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Solid gold primary buttons with black text. Ghost or outline secondary buttons with gold borders and hover states.

sections_and_components.name: Sticky Header
sections_and_components.guidelines: Use crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/70) with a 1px bottom border (border-white/10). Include Logo, Nav Links, and a 'Get an Estimate' CTA.

sections_and_components.name: Hero Section
sections_and_components.guidelines: Full-screen (h-screen). Use 'hero_architecture' image as background. Heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60). Center or left-aligned massive heading, gold overline, dual CTAs.

sections_and_components.name: About Section
sections_and_components.guidelines: Story-driven split layout. Bold typography emphasizing '20+ Years of Excellence'. Use 'blueprint_review' image to show professional process.

sections_and_components.name: Services Grid
sections_and_components.guidelines: 7 services. Use a dynamic grid (e.g., 3 columns, some spanning 2 columns). Each card uses surface color (#141414), 1px subtle border, gold hover effect.

sections_and_components.name: Portfolio / Featured Projects
sections_and_components.guidelines: Use Shadcn Tabs for category filters (All, Residential, ADU, Commercial). Display 'luxury_interior' and 'exterior' images in a large masonry or bento grid.

sections_and_components.name: Process Section
sections_and_components.guidelines: 4 visual steps (Suitability, Design, Permits, Build). Use vertical timeline or horizontal cards with large gold numbers (01, 02, etc.) and 'concrete_texture' subtle backgrounds.

sections_and_components.name: Service Area
sections_and_components.guidelines: Focus on Charlotte, NC. Use 'charlotte_skyline' image with a dark gradient overlay and large typography highlighting the region.

sections_and_components.name: Estimator Tool
sections_and_components.guidelines: Interactive calculator using Shadcn sliders, selects, and inputs. Should look technical but premium. Housed in a #141414 card with gold accents.

sections_and_components.name: Contact / Footer
sections_and_components.guidelines: Massive typography for 'Let's Build'. Integrated form (Shadcn) and styled dark Google Maps embed block. Generous padding.

testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
instructions_to_main_agent: Use Next.js app router or React Vite structure. Prioritize pure HTML/Tailwind for layout wrappers to allow maximum asymmetry, reserving Shadcn strictly for interactive elements (Forms, Tabs, Slider). Ensure 'Cabinet Grotesk' is imported (e.g., via Fontshare) and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts. Do NOT use standard gray. Use the defined charcoal black (#0A0A0A) and gold (#D4AF37) palette exclusively.
